title: Trump-Xi summit wraps up — both agree Hormuz must stay open & Iran no nukes; 'constructive strategic stability' framework; Xi warns over Taiwan
snippet: Trump and Xi wrapped up critical two-day talks in Beijing claiming progress in stabilizing US-China relations. Both agreed Iran can never have a nuclear weapon and that Hormuz must remain open. Xi reserved sharpest language for Taiwan. No formal joint communique issued. China agreed to a 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework for the next three years.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 정상회담 결과 보도 없음. 5/14 src-1053은 도착/개시 보도이며 결과 보도는 신규.
